justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed (SELECT FOR UPDATE + transaction), TOCTOU named explicitly, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named in finding title and confidence section
Race condition correctly classified as Critical with clear reproduction steps
Atomic fix is specific: SELECT FOR UPDATE within a transaction, not a vague 'use a transaction'
Partial failure between cart add and stock decrement identified as separate Critical finding
Bonus: caught negative quantity exploit that could create inventory out of thin air
Bonus: noted idempotency gap and operation ordering recommendation

agent_output_excerpt: {"summary":{"verdict":"BLOCK","one_liner":"Critical race condition between stock check and decrement will oversell inventory under concurrent requests"},"critical_findings":[{"title":"TOCTOU Race Condition: Stock Check vs. Decrement","risk":"Multiple concurrent requests read the same stock value, all pass the check, then all decrement — selling more units than exist.
